title: Resync debt baselines to main; fix complexity line-keying
intent: Three technical-debt gates were red on main independent of any PR, taxing every PR's red-classification. Resync the ratchet baselines to current main and fix the complexity gate's brittle line-based identity key so the false positive does not recur. CI/governance plumbing only; no product behavior change, no runtime path touched.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) check_complexity.py: the baseline-match identity key drops the line component (file:function:line -> file:function). repair_body_geometry shifted 607->605 after an unrelated merge and the line-keyed baseline re-reported it as a new cc=26 violation though its complexity is unchanged. (2) file_sizes_baseline.json: add tests/cam/test_lifecycle_policy_engine.py (528 LOC, grew via #161); the re-sort also corrected a pre-existing mis-ordering and the stale violation_count (150->152). (3) test_technical_debt_gates.py: bump TARGET_MAX_LARGE_FILES 96->99 (actual app/ count; 3 large files added since the 2026-06-13 baseline).
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The complexity change is a keying fix, not a one-shot line bump: a line bump would re-break on the next edit above the function, whereas keying by file:function tracks the function across moves. The two baseline updates accept current merged reality as the ratchet floor — the gates' designed maintenance path when main itself has drifted red.

commands_run: services/api .venv: python -m app.ci.check_complexity --baseline app/ci/complexity_baseline.json -> OK (exit 0), was 1 violation
services/api .venv: python -m app.ci.check_file_sizes --baseline app/ci/file_sizes_baseline.json -> OK (exit 0), was 1 violation

files.intent: Drop the brittle line component from the complexity baseline identity key (file:function:line -> file:function) so a function that moves lines is not re-flagged as new
files.behavior_change: none - CI gate matching only; detection power for complexity-increase is unchanged (the gate never compared complexity magnitude); no product/runtime path

files.intent: Add tests/cam/test_lifecycle_policy_engine.py (528 LOC) to the plural file-size baseline; correct stale violation_count and ordering
Bump TARGET_MAX_LARGE_FILES 96->99 to the actual current app/ large-file count
